_comment: Allow-list of issued license keys. Add one row per license you give out.

license_key (the JSON key, e.g. 'ABCDEFG.machine_fp: null on first issue; server TOFU-pins it on first successful auth
license_key (the JSON key, e.g. 'ABCDEFG.first_seen: ISO-8601 UTC, set by server on TOFU pin
license_key (the JSON key, e.g. 'ABCDEFG.note: free-form, e.g. customer email — server ignores it

ABCDEFGH-1234.note: example — replace with a real key issued by build_tools/issue_license.py
